title: AlloyDB AI: Revolutionizing Hybrid Search for PostgreSQL
summary: AlloyDB AI extends PostgreSQL with hybrid search combining vector search and full-text search, enabling sub-second semantic queries on large datasets. It provides embedding generation, ScaNN-based vector search, and integrated AI functions like summarization and text generation through SQL.
